##MEMBER AUTORBN
NOTIFYMSGS(CONSOLE)
MSGID(ARC0380A)
   DELAY(60S)
   REPLY(CANCEL)
MSGID(IEE094D)
   NOAUTORREPLY
##MEMBER AUTOR01
/* IEFC166D REPLY Y/N TO EXECUTE/SUPPRESS COMMAND                   */
/*                                                                  */
/* RULE: 1                                                          */
/*                                                                  */
   MSGID(IEFC166D)   DELAY(2S) REPLY(Y)
